query:
CREATE TABLE customers (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(320),
  phone VARCHAR(50),
  address TEXT,
  customermaf VARCHAR(100),
  fieldManager INT,
  assignmentStatus ENUM('assigned', 'unassigned') DEFAULT 'unassigned',
  latitude VARCHAR(50),
  longitude VARCHAR(50),
  serviceType VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'maintenance',
  priority ENUM('high', 'medium', 'low') DEFAULT 'medium',
  buildingId VARCHAR(100),
  zohoContactId VARCHAR(100),
  coordinateSource VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'manual',
  isMainBuilding INT DEFAULT 0,
  mainBuildingCustomerId INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
